projectScope.objective: mathcrew frontend 3D rendering quality revolution, edu-tech stack adoption, content delivery paradigm shift, component architecture innovation
backendDomains: LOGIC (BKT + CRA + scaffolding + scene state machines)
ACTION (xAPI emission, FSRS scheduling, scaffold adjustment)
LEARN (xAPI LRS, 5 misconception detectors, refinement signals)

ddd: Each interaction primitive = Koota entity with traits, 1:1 with ontology PrimitiveRegistryDefinition
CRA stages as first-class domain concepts (P1)
FSRS card = Question entity + scheduling metadata
5 misconception types as typed error codes (P10)
dry: Extract InteractionEngine via Koota traits (shared pickup/drop/build across scenes)
Unify step progression with XState actor (replace 5x useStepProgression hooks)
Shared TSL toon material library (MeshToonNodeMaterial + shared gradientMap)
ocp: Koota traits: new scene = spawn entity with traits, zero changes to SceneEngine
TSL PostProcessing pipeline via composition (add effects, never modify chain)
Scaffold Engine: pluggable hint providers per misconception type
pecs: Producer: scene spawns Koota entities with specific trait shapes
Consumer: SceneEngine queries entities by trait archetype
Input: producers emit abstract actions, consumers interpret per-context
§DC5-06 mapping: Koota Traits = Structs, Relations = Object-backed Links

primitives: Interfaces — InteractionPrimitive<T> via Koota trait archetypes
Derived Properties — scaffoldLevel, fsrsSchedule, craStage, failurePattern
Object-backed Link Types — Koota relation() for island progression, studentMasteryAtCRAStage
Reducers — misconception frequency aggregation per student per concept
pedagogicalPrinciples: P5: Instruction-First for Elementary (PF contraindicated for grades 3-5)
P6: 3-Tier Hints (nudge → hint → worked example → direct)
P9: Dual-Channel Delivery (audio + visual, Temporal Contiguity d=0.87)
P11: 4 Visual Models (arrays, sharing, Venn, factor trees)
P12: Zones of Proximal Flow (Flow ∩ ZPD)

recommendedStack.name: Scene Engine Revolution (Option B) — Updated with Koota + Safety Layer

technologies.name: Koota
technologies.role: pmndrs official ECS — entity management with traits + relations

technologies.name: Zustand
technologies.role: Global app state (session, mastery, active island)

technologies.name: MeshToonNodeMaterial
technologies.role: Built-in TSL toon rendering (no custom shaders)

technologies.name: detect-gpu
technologies.role: GPU tier detection for adaptive quality

technologies.name: Motion
technologies.role: Spring-physics R3F animation for math objects

technologies.name: mathjs
technologies.role: Expression evaluation + verification for AI safety

recommendedStack.rationale: Koota(pmndrs ECS) + XState(actors) + Zustand(global) = 3-layer state. MeshToonNodeMaterial = built-in toon rendering. SafeTutors 4-layer safety. Instruction-first pedagogy (P5). viber3d reference architecture validated.

alternatives.name: Miniplex instead of Koota
alternatives.whyNot: No relation() system, not pmndrs ecosystem, no §DC5-06 direct mapping

alternatives.name: Full Rebuild (Option C)
alternatives.whyNot: React ecosystem abandoned, ontology-first destroyed, irreversible

layers: L1: Pedagogical Prompt — Socratic, no answer disclosure, grade-level language
L2: Input Threat Detection — PII, self-harm, profanity
L3: Async Moderation Agent — turn count tracking, 3+ hints zoom out, 8 queries/day
L4: Teacher HITL Review — unresolved confusion escalation with full history
aiSafety.criticalFinding: SafeTutors: multi-turn pedagogical harm 17.7% → 77.8%. PNAS: unguarded AI harms learning outcomes.
aiSafety.mathVerification: mathjs + SymPy pattern from Khanmigo: verify both tutor and student work before responding

koreanCurriculum.downstreamDependency: Unit 3 (약분과 통분) + Unit 4 (분수의 덧셈과 뺄셈) — 3 consecutive dependent units, rare in Korean elementary math
koreanCurriculum.significance: 초등 수학의 첫 논리 관문 — 개념적 추론이 단순 계산을 대체하는 전환점

misconceptionTaxonomy.name: Factors/Multiples Confusion
misconceptionTaxonomy.detection: lists multiples when asked for factors

forwardProp.description: Extended ontology -> Koota traits -> core contracts -> client runtime

backwardProp.description: 3D events -> xAPI -> LRS -> CRA tracking -> FSRS -> scaffolding -> misconception detection -> refinement -> ontology
steps: xAPI statement emission (@xapi/xapi: Actor + Verb + Object + misconception extension)
CRA progression tracking (which stage per student per concept?)
FSRS scheduling updates (when should student revisit?)
Scaffold level adjustment (P6: which hint tier?)
Misconception classification (P10: which of 5 error types?)
AI safety monitoring (SafeTutors L3: turn count, harm detection)

implementationStrategy.name: Golden Tables
implementationStrategy.description: Rendering revolution + data normalization + input abstraction
deliverables: @xapi/xapi statement schema + embedded LRS in NestJS

implementationStrategy.name: Operational Decision-Making
deliverables: CRA Progression Tracker (P1: gate criteria per concept zone)
Motion R3F spring animations for math objects

implementationStrategy.name: AI-First
implementationStrategy.description: AI tutoring with safety + math animations + procedural environment

blueprint.evaluatorReason: All 13 gates passed. Updated with: Koota > Miniplex (§DC5-06 mapping), MeshToonNodeMaterial (built-in), SafeTutors 4-layer safety, Productive Failure corrected (P5: instruction-first for elementary), 5 misconception types, Korean curriculum mapping, 13 pedagogical design principles with effect sizes.
